__NOTE__: For fast, non-rate-limited access + real-time WS event streaming, set alchemyKey (or rpcHttpPrivate/rpcWssPrivate, or env RH_RPC_HTTP/RH_RPC_WSS). Get a free key at dashboard.alchemy.com -> create a Robinhood Chain app. Addresses verified against official Uniswap + Robinhood docs (July 2026) and confirmed to have live on-chain bytecode.

safety.note: Runs buy+sell quote simulation before firing; blocks likely honeypots / >50% round-trip tax. Set false for raw speed (no checks). Brand-new pools can't be quoted until liquidity lands, so a blocked match is RECHECKED every retryMs up to retries times (default: 20 x 3s = 1 min window) before giving up on that token; the sniper stays armed either way.

discovery.note: Reliable-listening knobs. pollMs = how often the HTTP backbone scans for new pools (lower = faster + more RPC load). heartbeatMs = how often a 'still listening' breadcrumb is logged. maxBlockSpan = starting max blocks per getLogs call; the span auto-shrinks if the provider caps the range (e.g. Alchemy free tier = 10 blocks) so the scan cursor never wedges.
